title: Publicis Media - Expert Intelligence & Analytics (m/w/d)
required_skills: Degree in BWL / Controlling / Finance / Wirtschaftsinformatik / Mathematik
Multi-year experience in Controlling, Analytics, Revenue Management or Investment
P&L logic, Business Cases, and management KPIs
Structuring and visualising complex data for decision-making
bonus_skills: BI tools (Power BI, Tableau or similar)
Experience in media or communications industry
matched_skills: Multi-year experience in Controlling / Analytics / Revenue Management (HSBC, Minth, Hapag-Lloyd)
P&L logic and management KPIs (financial performance analytics USD 8M programme, KPIs across 12 product lines)
C-level data storytelling and executive-ready reporting
Cross-functional stakeholder management and project coordination
Revenue / investment data analysis and budget variance dashboards
missing_skills: Explicit BI tool proficiency (Power BI, Tableau) not stated in CV
Excel advanced proficiency not explicitly highlighted in CV
Scenario analysis and forecasting experience not explicitly mentioned
core_responsibilities: Analyse Umsatz-, Revenue- und Investmentdaten; derive targets, measures and tracking
Design and maintain steering-relevant KPIs, dashboards and reports
Develop scenario analyses and investment forecasts
Prepare ad-hoc analyses and Executive Summaries for management and stakeholders
Collaborate with Product, BI and Tech teams; act as sparring partner for senior leadership
recommended_emphasis: Highlight financial performance analytics experience at HSBC (USD 8M programme, budget variance dashboards, 6 workstreams) — maps directly to Revenue Management and P&L steering
Emphasise executive dashboard work at Minth Group (12 product lines, EMEA/APAC KPIs) as evidence of steering-relevant reporting
Frame Hapag-Lloyd data tracking role in terms of cross-functional stakeholder coordination and measurement consistency
Add Excel to the skills section explicitly; mention any BI tool exposure (even basic Power BI or Tableau) to cover the bonus skill
Use the phrase 'data-driven decision support' and 'actionable insights for senior stakeholders' to echo JD language
